rootCause: The reminder quest start gate required "Completionist Award II" even though the prerequisite quest (completionist/polish) deterministically transforms that item into "Completionist Award II (polished)" via a required process path. The existing quest completable-item tests tracked whether items were ever obtainable, but not whether prerequisite quest chains consumed and replaced required items before dependent quest entry.
resolution: Added a regression test that simulates deterministic prerequisite quest completion with process consume/create effects and verifies dependent quest start gates remain satisfiable. Updated completionist/reminder to gate on "Completionist Award II (polished)" so progression remains completable after completionist/polish.
